name: done-bear
description: Search and manage your Done Bear tasks from Raycast
author: mblode

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: show-today
commands.title: Show Today List
commands.description: Search and manage your today tasks

commands.name: show-inbox
commands.title: Show Inbox List
commands.description: Search and manage your inbox tasks

commands.name: show-anytime
commands.title: Show Anytime List
commands.description: Search and manage your anytime tasks

commands.name: show-upcoming
commands.title: Show Upcoming List
commands.description: Search and manage your upcoming tasks

commands.name: show-someday
commands.title: Show Someday List
commands.description: Search and manage your someday tasks

commands.name: search-tasks
commands.title: Search Tasks
commands.description: Search tasks globally across all projects

commands.name: create-task
commands.title: Create Task
commands.description: Create a task with all fields

commands.name: menu-bar-today
commands.title: Show Today in Menu Bar
commands.description: See your Today list in the menu bar

title: Done Bear
